arts.ttl: Jürgen Klinsmann laments Thomas Müller’s time at Bayern Munich coming to an end
arts.sum: Jürgen Klinsmann has a special relationship with Thomas Müller and the former star player is sad to see Müller’s exit from Bayern Munich be within range. I think talking about Thomas, you don’t even know where to start or where to stop, because he’s had such a fantastic career and is simply such a top guy.

arts.ttl: Report: Bayern Munich looking to offload João Palhinha this summer
arts.sum: Per a report captured by @iMiaSanMia, Bayern is looking to sell Palhinha to another club in the upcoming transfer window . While Palhinha tries to fight for his chance, Bayern will be trying to sell him to a Premier League club and hope that he will agree to it.

arts.ttl: Arsenal 'learn' Kingsley Coman asking price as Bayern Munich outline transfer stance
arts.sum: Arsenal reportedly learn how much it will take to sign Kingsley Coman from German giants Bayern Munich in the summer transfer window.

arts.ttl: Bayern Munich sporting chief Max Eberl is familiar with Tim Kleindienst — but that doesn’t mean he’ll sign him
arts.sum: But Eberl denied that it meant Bayern was therefore interested now, even as the Bavarians — with Thomas Müller about to ride off into the sunset and Eric Maxim Choupo-Moting having left last summer — hunt for a backup for superstar striker Harry Kane. “It was a big transfer from Gladbach,” Eberl continued.

arts.ttl: European football: Scott McTominay double keeps Napoli on Inter’s title trail
arts.sum: Napoli three points off top after beating Empoli 3-0 Atlético overcome lowly Valladolid 4-2 in La Liga Napoli cruised to a 3-0 home win over Empoli on Monday, with Scott McTominay striking twice and Romelu Lukaku also on target as the hosts kept pace with Inter. Antonio Conte’s side were feeling the pressure after Inter’s 3-1 home win against Cagliari on Saturday, but they cut the gap back to three points with six matches to go. Napoli are also seven points clear of Atalanta in third as the Serie A title battle narrows to a two-horse race. Continue reading...

arts.ttl: Christoph Freund confirms that live scouting will be more vital for Bayern Munich in order to get “insights on a player’s character”
arts.sum: Freund sat down with reporter Nino Duit to hold an interview, as captured by @iMiaSanMia, in which the Austrian explained why live scouting transfer targets is so important: “The first step, of course, is to watch an interesting player on video. While this is a good method of scouting opponents-as Inter will be Bayern’s opponent for the Champions League quarterfinals — it was rumored that center back Malick Thiaw was also being watched as a potential transfer target.

arts.ttl: McTominay and Politano not focused on Inter in Serie A title race
arts.sum: Scott McTominay and Matteo Politano insist Napoli must ‘focus on themselves’ in the Serie A...

arts.ttl: Arsenal contact Bayern over Coman - Tuesday's gossip
arts.sum: Arsenal are interested in Kingsley Coman, Crystal Palace may move for Marcus Rashford and Eintracht Frankfurt have stated their price for Hugo Ekitike.

arts.ttl: Jürgen Klinsmann waxes poetic about Thomas Müller’s debut at Bayern Munich
arts.sum: With all of the talk about Bayern Munich star Thomas Müller these days, the coach that gave him his debut, Jürgen Klinsmann, thought back about that time. There are a few guys there who are good, and Gerd Müller, who was my idol as a little boy, was the assistant coach in this amateur team,” Klinsmann told Sky Sport .

arts.ttl: Inter vs. Bayern Munich preview: Team news and predicted lineups
arts.sum: Here is our preview of Wednesday's Champions League quarter-final second leg clash between Inter and Bayern Munich, including our predicted lineups.
